task: Phase 24 Task 3 - inner-path management-action dynamics prototype (bonus cashflow response)
phase: Phase 24: With-Actions Aggregation Consistency + Inner-Path Action Dynamics

outer_node_vs_inner_path.interpretation: positive means the cashflow-response basis gives less immediate relief than the Phase 23 outer-node transform

task1_acceptance_criteria: Inner-path prototype: bonus cut enters horizon-level inner cashflows in the nested truth AND the proxy basis identically
Seven-driver OOS re-validation: R^2 >= 0.95, VaR rel err <= 10% (unchanged Phase 22 gates)
Action monotonicity preserved (construction guard re-verified on the inner-path basis)
Outer-node vs inner-path capital delta disclosed; residual (full path-wise declaration) documented

without_actions_crosscheck.note: Derived from archived Phase 23 Task 3 arrays/report because this Windows automation shell has no Python launcher.

method: Prototype decomposes L into guaranteed/non-cuttable PV plus cuttable bonus-cashflow PV = bonus_share * L. The governed retained-bonus factor is evaluated on the pre-action coverage ratio, then applied to that bonus-cashflow PV with a one-year response factor. The same basis is applied to nested truth and proxy prediction.
limitations: Horizon-level prototype only; no monthly path-wise bonus declaration loop.
Bonus cashflow response factor 0.85 is an educational placeholder for recognition lag / already-vested bonus inertia.

This evidence draft is derived from archived Phase 23 Task 3 report values because Python/pytest is unavailable in the current Windows shell; rerun the Python staged builder in a Python-enabled environment for full array-level verification.
Reference assets remain the fixed leakage-free Phase 23 proxy.

approved_uses: Quantifying the first-order delta between outer-node and inner-path management-action treatment
Regression testing that the proxy applies the same cashflow response basis as the nested ground truth
residuals: No monthly path-wise re-declaration loop; the action is evaluated once at the capital horizon.
The bonus-cashflow share and response factor are educational placeholders pending credentialled management-practice data.
Reference assets remain the fixed Phase 23 leakage-free proxy.

standard_references: Solvency II Delegated Regulation Article 23 (future management actions)
